seo.title: North Hills Psychiatry | Compassionate Psychiatric Care in Austin
seo.description: Patient-centered psychiatric care for adults and families in North Hills, Austin, Texas.

practice.name: North Hills Psychiatry
practice.locationLabel: Located in North Hills, Austin, Texas

hero.title: Care that starts with understanding.
hero.copy: Psychiatric care for adults and families navigating anxiety, ADHD, depression, and life transitions with thoughtful, individualized treatment.

providers.name: Dr. Zita Samuel
providers.philosophy: Works with each patient and their support system to understand the whole person and develop thoughtful, individualized care.
providers.bio: Dr. Zita Samuel is board certified in adult psychiatry. She completed adult psychiatry residency at Loyola University Medical Center / Edward Hines VA Medical Center, where she was elected Chief Resident and received Resident of the Year. She later served as Assistant Professor at the University of Texas Medical Branch and taught psychiatry residents at Shoal Creek.
providers.tagline: Collaborative adult psychiatric care that considers the patient, their support system, life stressors, and biological factors.
bioParagraphs: Dr. Zita Samuel is board certified in adult psychiatry and works with patients and their support systems to develop a fuller understanding of each person. She believes stressors, life events, and biological factors all shape mental health.

She completed adult psychiatry residency at Loyola University Medical Center / Edward Hines VA Medical Center, where she was elected Chief Resident and received Resident of the Year. She later served as Assistant Professor at the University of Texas Medical Branch and taught psychiatry residents at Shoal Creek.

residency: Adult Psychiatry — Loyola University Medical Center / Edward Hines VA Medical Center

affiliations: Former Assistant Professor, University of Texas Medical Branch
Former psychiatry resident educator, UTMB at Shoal Creek

providers.name: Dr. Diana Samuel
providers.credentials: MD · Board Certified, Child & Adolescent Psychiatry · Board Certified, Adult Psychiatry
providers.philosophy: Takes time to understand each child and family, discuss treatment options, and support success at home, school, and in life.
providers.bio: Dr. Diana Samuel is board certified in child and adolescent psychiatry and adult psychiatry. She completed adult psychiatry residency at Baylor College of Medicine and child and adolescent psychiatry fellowship at the University of Texas Southwestern, where she served as chief fellow.
providers.tagline: Family-centered psychiatric care for children, adolescents, young adults, and families navigating treatment decisions.
bioParagraphs: Dr. Diana Samuel is board certified in child and adolescent psychiatry and adult psychiatry. She helps children, adolescents, young adults, and families with a thoughtful approach to medication management, psychotherapy-informed care, and family collaboration.

After Ross University Medical School, she completed adult psychiatry residency at Baylor College of Medicine in Houston and child and adolescent psychiatry fellowship at the University of Texas Southwestern in Dallas, where she was selected by faculty and peers to serve as chief fellow.

residency: Adult Psychiatry — Baylor College of Medicine, Houston, Texas
fellowship: Child and Adolescent Psychiatry — University of Texas Southwestern, Dallas, Texas

certifications: Board Certified, Child and Adolescent Psychiatry
affiliations: Former Consulting Psychiatrist, Dallas Independent School District
awards: Chief Fellow, Child and Adolescent Psychiatry Fellowship

conditionsIntro: We provide evaluation and ongoing treatment for a range of psychiatric and emotional health concerns.

plans.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas

faqs.question: Do you offer telehealth appointments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many appointments are available virtually, depending on provider availability and patient needs.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our office can help confirm accepted plans, benefits, and any next steps before your first visit.

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Submit the appointment request form or call the office. Our team will follow up with availability and next steps.

contact.title: Ready to get started?
contact.copy: Request an appointment and our office will follow up with next steps, availability, and insurance information.
contact.disclaimer: We typically respond within 1 business day.
